name: Varicella Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for varicella (chickenpox) vaccines. Used in childhood immunization (CIS) measures. One dose required by age 2; two doses for older children.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Measles, mumps, rubella, and varicella virus vaccine (MMRV)
Varicella virus vaccine (VAR), live, for subcutaneous use
